title: The Undelivered Mesaba Warning
description: Tucked under the base of the Marconi transmitter, a crumpled message form in Bride's handwriting records the 9:40 PM ice warning from the SS Mesaba: 'Ice report. Lat 42N to 41.25N, Long 49W to 50.30W. Saw much heavy pack ice and great number large icebergs. Also field ice.' The form was never stamped with a bridge delivery mark. The position described is precisely where Titanic struck.
